content.query:
SELECT TOP 10 CAST([Package ID (Package) (Package)] AS NVARCHAR) AS package_id
      ,CAST([Total Amount] AS DECIMAL) AS total_amt
      ,CAST([Created On] AS datetime) AS created_on
      ,CAST([Modified On] AS DATETIME) AS modified_on
      ,CAST([Quote ID] AS NVARCHAR) AS quote_id
      ,CAST([Contract ID] AS NVARCHAR) AS contract_id
      ,CAST([Approval Status] AS NVARCHAR) AS approval_status
      ,CAST([RPP Margin%] AS DECIMAL) AS rpp_margin
      ,CAST([Account On Creation] AS NVARCHAR)AS account_name
      ,CAST([Version No] AS BIGINT) AS version_no
      ,CAST([Quotation Status] AS NVARCHAR)  AS quotation_status
      ,CAST([Chopped Date] AS DATETIME) AS chopped_date
      ,CAST([Down Payment Received Date] AS DATETIME) AS down_payment_rcv_date
      ,CAST([Order Date] AS DATETIME) AS order_date
      ,CAST([VAT Tax Rate] AS DECIMAL) AS vat_tax_rate
      ,CAST([Account Type on creation] AS NVARCHAR )AS acc_type_on_creation
      ,CAST([Pricing Approved Date] AS DATETIME) AS pricing_approved_date
      ,[Company] AS company_name
      ,[Cost Centre] AS cost_center_code
      ,[Down Payment Type] AS down_payment_type
      ,[If Bid] AS if_bid
      ,[If Chopped] AS if_chopped
      ,[If Down Payment Received] AS if_down_payment_rcv
      ,[If standard Legal Term] AS if_std_legal_term
      ,LEFT([Package],100) AS package_name
      ,[Owner] AS owner
      ,[Payment Term Type] AS payment_term_type
      ,[Project Name] AS project_name
      ,[SAP Area Code] AS sap_area_code
      ,[SAP Branch Code] AS sap_branch_code
      ,[SAP SO Number] AS sap_so_number
      ,[Green Channel] AS green_channel
      ,[Key Account/Stock Dealer Agreement] AS key_account
      ,[MSP Margin%] AS msp_margin
      ,[Standard Cost %] AS std_cost
      ,[TP Margin%] AS tp_margin
      ,[utc_package]
      ,[ownerid] 	  
	  ,'@{pipeline().parameters.fileName}' AS [meta_source]
      ,GETDATE() AS [meta_creation_date]
      ,'@{pipeline().parameters.source}' AS [meta_creation_by]
	  ,[migrated rppmargin] AS [migrated rppmargin]
  ,[owner code] AS [owner_code]
  ,[project code] AS [project_code]
  ,[quotation id] AS [quotation_id]
  ,[Account Code] AS [Account_Code]
  FROM [dbo].[Quotation-advanced find-BI (GM)]
